Harbor Peak Holdings Limited — Internal Compliance Note re PDPO/SFO controls for announced acquisition of Seabright Nutrition Group Limited (Main Board issuer obligations under HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 14).
MNPI status: transaction headline terms have been disclosed on HKEX News; board papers now carry “public-domain” watermark and no undisclosed price-sensitive terms remain in circulation.
SFO handling: advisors (Qilin Capital Partners (HK) Limited) and counterparties are on clean lists; wall-crossed recipients were restricted pre-announcement and the insider list has since been closed with no trading clearance pending.
DPA schedule: Schedule 3 (Data Processing) to the MSA with Cloud Meridian Pte. Ltd. is executed; Appendix A retention table and Appendix B minimisation controls have been adopted for deal-room and HR onboarding forms (fields: HKID, date of birth, contact number collected only where strictly necessary).
Cross-border transfers: Group Data Export Approval DEX-2026-014 (HK→SG analytics workspace) is fully signed and logged; no active exports are in progress and previous batches were de-identified and encrypted at rest and in transit.
Consent handling: investor and employee onboarding forms use dual-check consent boxes; two consent withdrawals were processed in Q1 with confirmation notices sent, and there are currently no outstanding withdrawals.
DSAR registry: one open Data Access/Erasure Request from a former contractor relating to recruitment files has been validated and is due for completion within the PDPO timeframe, with erasure to be performed after statutory record checks.
Retention: quarterly purge for legacy CVs and interview notes completed on 31 Mar 2026; the next review is scheduled for 30 Jun 2026, and no exceptions are pending approval.
Minimisation: KYC templates revised to remove collection of middle name and full address for Hong Kong residents; only district and partial address are captured for risk-scoring and are redacted in any export.
Employment workflow: HR role mailbox hr-privacy@harborpeak.example receives all DSAR and consent communications; no personal email processing is permitted for PD data.
Security markers: “ERASURE COMPLETE” and “RETAIN UNTIL” labels are applied in the repository and trigger automatic deletion flags; the existence of these labels in this memo does not indicate any current failure or incident.
Overseas counsel confirm that Section 33-style safeguards are adopted as a matter of policy notwithstanding commencement status; PCPD guidance on cross-border transfer and consent withdrawal is reflected in the DPA.
Negative assurance: there have been no data breaches, leak alerts, or unauthorised disclosures in the data room; any reference to “insider”, “sensitive”, or “price-material” herein is purely descriptive of control frameworks.
Governance: the Privacy Steering Committee approved this control set on 12 May 2026; SFC enquiries mailbox has not raised any follow-up on the public disclosure and the trading blackout has already lapsed.
Form labels (benign examples): Applicant ID: A123-XX-0000; Trade Ref: HKG-TEST-009; Account Alias: DEMO-ACCT-01 (these are placeholders and not linked to living individuals or active instruments).
